successCriteria.description: src/modules/notification/notification.model.ts exists and exports Notification, CreateNotificationDto, UpdateNotificationDto, and INotificationRepository interfaces
src/modules/notification/notification.repository.ts exists and exports NotificationRepository class implementing INotificationRepository
NotificationRepository implements all methods from INotificationRepository: create, findById, update, findUnreadByRecipient
NotificationRepository methods use PostgreSQL pool for database operations (GP-001 compliance)
All notification types match the canonical SQL schema: 'leave_request', 'leave_approval', 'leave_rejection', 'balance_update', 'policy_change'
NotificationRepository.create method writes an audit log record for the notification creation (GP-002 compliance) within the same database transaction

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through repository interfaces
GP-002: Audit records - All state-changing operations write an audit record
GP-003: Input validation - Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
GP-006: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Use PostgreSQL pool for database operations
Notification types must match canonical SQL schema: 'leave_request', 'leave_approval', 'leave_rejection', 'balance_update', 'policy_change'

Field names must match canonical entity fields: Notification(id, recipientId, senderId, type, title, message, metadata, isRead, readAt, createdAt), CreateNotificationDto(recipientId, senderId, type, title, message, metadata), UpdateNotificationDto(isRead, readAt)
outOfScope: Database schema creation (assumes notifications table exists)
